kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Either Tanner goes with 9 coins or someone in the North Side goes with 9 coins.
Either 9 coins goes with Potter or someone in the Hill Ward goes with Potter (but not both).
The artisan in Riverside's levy is higher than both Matilda and the Tanner.
Exactly one of Aldric, Matilda, Rowan, and the Cooper belongs to the South Side.
Wulfric's levy is lower than both the Cooper and the artisan in Eastcheap.
Matilda, Mason, Oldwall, and 11 coins belong to different artisans.
Exactly two of Godfrey, Matilda, Rowan, and the Blacksmith belong to the Market Ward.
Between Kingsford and Southgate, one goes with Carpenter and the other with Potter.
Aldric, Godfrey, and Matilda go with 9 coins, 12 coins, and 13 coins, in some order.
The Cooper's levy is at least 2 coins away from the artisan in Eastcheap.
Matilda goes with exactly two of Mason, Southgate, and 13 coins.
More members of the Ironmongers' Guild are in the North Side than members of the Joiners' Guild.
